privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating synthetic GPX data using Garmin BaseCamp's UI. The agent is explicitly instructed to create a custom activity profile named 'SAR-ATV', draw a new route with at least 3 points, and export the route to 'C:\workspace\sar_patrol_route.gpx'. All metadata values exactly match the explicitly stated task instructions and verifier constraints.
